zh.lifeSummary: 當Angele de VIGNACOURT OU WIGNACOURT於大約1134年出生在法國皮卡迪索姆維尼亞格特時，她的父親Adrein de Wignacourt32歲，母親Gersende de Montreuil17歲。她於大約1149年與GILLES Escuyer在法國豪-德-福朗斯索姆波奧瓦爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1186年在法國豪-德-福朗斯索姆波奧瓦爾享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Angele de VIGNACOURT OU WIGNACOURT于大约1134年出生在法国皮卡迪索姆維尼亞格特时，她的父亲Adrein de Wignacourt32岁，母亲Gersende de Montreuil17岁。她于大约1149年与GILLES Escuyer在法国豪-德-福朗斯索姆波奧瓦爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1186年在法国豪-德-福朗斯索姆波奧瓦爾享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: OU
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ying, Ching, Heng, Hong, Jia, Kuang Yu, Li-Ching, Cho, Chong, Chung, Sa.  Southeast Asian Lichun, Ming, Quan, Roeun, Sokhom, Chau, Hai, Leang, Ly, Nhanh, Phan, Pho, Tha.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 歐, meaning ‘to sing someone's praise’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the placename Dong Ou (東甌), a fief (in present-day Wenzhou in Zhejiang province) which was granted to Yao in 192  BC . It is said that Yao was a descendant of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the placename Ou Yu (歐餘), the name of a fief (located in present-day Zhejiang province) that was granted to Ti, the second son of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 區, originally denoting an ancient vessel for measurement in ancient Chinese: from the personal name of Ou Zhizi (歐治子), an expert sword-maker who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ). Some of his descendants inherited Ou (歐) as their surname, simplifying the Chinese character 歐 to 區.

variants.name: Ow
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Cheng, Jing, Kam Fung, Wai Shing, Wing, Yali, Yuk.
variant Romanization of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Ou Yang
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Ming, Wei, Hui, Jian, Hong, Chieh, Chu, Xin, Zhuo, Baoping, Biao, Bin, Hai, Pu, Quan, Tuan.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 歐陽, from Ou-Yu (歐餘), the name of a hill in Wucheng (in present-day Zhejiang province), which was granted to Ti, the second son of king Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ) in the state of Yue. Most of his descendants lived to the south of the hill called Ou-Yu (歐餘). The southern side of a hill was called Yang (陽) in ancient Chinese; the surname Ou-Yang (歐陽), literally means ‘the south of the Ou-Yu (歐餘) hill’. See also   Ou   1.

nameMeanings.name: Angele
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Church Latin, a feminine form of the boy's name Angelus ( see Angel ). The older feminine form Angelis has been completely superseded by Angela, which increased greatly in popularity in Britain and America from the 18th century onwards.

en.lifeSummary: When Angele de VIGNACOURT OU WIGNACOURT was born about 1134, in Vignacourt, Somme, Picardie, France, her father, Adrein de Wignacourt, was 32 and her mother, Gersende de Montreuil, was 17. She married GILLES Escuyer about 1149, in Beauval, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died about 1186, in Beauval, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Angele de VIGNACOURT OU WIGNACOURT est née environ 1134, à Vignacourt, Somme, Picardie, France, son père, Adrein de Wignacourt, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Gersende de Montreuil, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé GILLES Escuyer environ 1149, à Beauval, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1186, à Beauval, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Angele de VIGNACOURT OU WIGNACOURT um 1134 in Vignacourt, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Adrein de Wignacourt 32 und ihre Mutter Gersende de Montreuil 17. Sie hat um 1149 in Beauval, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich GILLES Escuyer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb um 1186 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Beauval, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Angele de VIGNACOURT OU WIGNACOURT è nata il circa 1134 nel Vignacourt, Somme, Picardie, Francia, sua padre, Adrein de Wignacourt, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Gersende de Montreuil, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato GILLES Escuyer circa 1149, nel Beauval, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì circa 1186, nel Beauval, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Angele de VIGNACOURT OU WIGNACOURTが約1134年にフランスピカーディソンメヴィグナコウルトで生まれた時，父Adrein de Wignacourtは32歳，母Gersende de Montreuilは17歳であった。約1149年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスソンメビーウヴァルでGILLES Escuyerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1186年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスソンメビーウヴァルで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Angele de VIGNACOURT OU WIGNACOURT(이)가 대략 1134년 프랑스 피카디 솜 비그나쿠르트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Adrein de Wignacourt(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gersende de Montreuil(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 대략 1149년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 솜 보발에서 GILLES Escuyer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1186년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 솜 보발에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.ABT 1134–ABT 1186: tany ho any amin'ny 1134–tany ho any amin'ny 1186

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Angele de VIGNACOURT OU WIGNACOURT nasceu aproximadamente 1134, em Vignacourt, Somme, Picardie, França, seu pai, Adrein de Wignacourt, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Gersende de Montreuil, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com GILLES Escuyer aproximadamente 1149, em Beauval, Somme, Hauts-de-France, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1186, em Beauval, Somme, Hauts-de-France, França, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Angele de VIGNACOURT OU WIGNACOURT родилась около 1134 г. в местности вигнакоурт, сомм, пикарди, Франция, её отцу по имени Adrein de Wignacourt было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Gersende de Montreuil, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени GILLES Escuyer около 1149 г. в местности боваль, сомм, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла около 1186 г. в местности боваль, сомм, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Angele de VIGNACOURT OU WIGNACOURT nació aproximadamente 1134, en Vignacourt, Somme, Picardie, Francia, su papá, Adrein de Wignacourt, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Gersende de Montreuil, tenía 17 años. Se casó con GILLES Escuyer aproximadamente 1149, en Beauval, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1186, en Beauval, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 54 años.
